ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater / Mango Sandstorm (TA450) cloud-share → ScreenConnect / Atera RMM installer chain
ucs.description: Detects the canonical TA450 / Mango Sandstorm initial-access chain where an Iranian operator phishes a PDF whose link points to Egnyte / ShareFile / OneHub / TeraBox / Filebin, the victim downloads a ZIP that contains an installer for a legitimate RMM (ScreenConnect, Atera, RemoteUtilities, SimpleHelp, Syncro), and that installer is then executed within an hour of the download. Pairs the cloud-file-share download with the RMM-installer execution on the same device — the actor-specific signature called out in Microsoft's April-2024 Mango Sandstorm advisory and Proofpoint's TA450 Israel-targetin
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as first_run values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("ScreenConnect.ClientSetup.exe","ScreenConnect.WindowsClient.exe","ConnectWiseControl.ClientSetup.exe","AteraAgent.exe","AteraAgent.msi","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","RemoteUtilities.exe","SimpleHelp.exe","SimpleService.exe","SyncroInstaller.exe","Syncro.Installer.exe","AnyDesk.exe","client32.exe","PCMonitorSrv.exe") OR (Processes.process_name="msiexec.exe" AND (Processes.process="*screenconnect*" OR Processes.process="*connectwise*" OR Processes.process="*atera*" OR Processes.process="*remoteutilities*" OR Processes.process="*simplehelp*" OR Processes.process="*syncro*" OR Processes.process="*anydesk*" OR Processes.process="*netsupport*"))) AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name
| rename Processes.* AS *
| join type=inner dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as download_time values(Web.url) as download_url from datamodel=Web where (Web.url="*egnyte.com*" OR Web.url="*sharefile.com*" OR Web.url="*onehub.com*" OR Web.url="*terabox.com*" OR Web.url="*filebin.net*" OR Web.url="*wetransfer.com*" OR Web.url="*mediafire.com*" OR Web.url="*1fichier.com*") AND Web.http_user_agent!="" by Web.dest
    | rename Web.dest AS dest
]
| where first_run>=download_time AND first_run<=(download_time+3600)
| eval delay_minutes=round((first_run-download_time)/60,1)
| table first_run dest user parent process_name cmdline download_time delay_minutes download_url
| sort - first_run
ucs.kql:
let _rmm_installers = dynamic(["screenconnect.clientsetup.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe","connectwisecontrol.clientsetup.exe","ateraagent.exe","ateraagent.msi","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","remoteutilities.exe","simplehelp.exe","simpleservice.exe","syncroinstaller.exe","anydesk.exe","client32.exe","pcmonitorsrv.exe"]);
let _cloud_share_hosts = dynamic(["egnyte.com","sharefile.com","onehub.com","terabox.com","filebin.net","wetransfer.com","mediafire.com","1fichier.com","sync.com"]);
let _drops = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","outlook.exe","explorer.exe")
    | where (FileName endswith ".msi" or FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".zip")
    | where FileOriginUrl has_any (_cloud_share_hosts) or FileOriginReferrerUrl has_any (_cloud_share_hosts)
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DroppedFile = FileName, DroppedSHA = SHA256, FileOriginUrl, FileOriginReferrerUrl;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName has_any (_rmm_installers))
    or (FileName =~ "msiexec.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any (_rmm_installers))
    or (InitiatingProcessFileName has_any (_rmm_installers) and FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe"))
| join kind=inner _drops on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DropTime .. DropTime + 2h)
| project Timestamp, DropTime,
          DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, DropTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          RmmProcess = FileName, RmmCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          DroppedFile, DroppedSHA, FileOriginUrl, FileOriginReferrerUrl
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _rmm_installers = dynamic(["screenconnect.clientsetup.exe","screenconnect.windowsclient.exe","connectwisecontrol.clientsetup.exe","ateraagent.exe","ateraagent.msi","rutserv.exe","rfusclient.exe","remoteutilities.exe","simplehelp.exe","syncroinstaller.exe","anydesk.exe","client32.exe","pcmonitorsrv.exe"]);
let _cloud_share_hosts = dynamic(["egnyte.com","sharefile.com","onehub.com","terabox.com","filebin.net","wetransfer.com","mediafire.com","1fichier.com"]);
let _drops = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where ActingProcessName in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","outlook.exe")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".msi" or TargetFileName endswith ".exe" or TargetFileName endswith ".zip"
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, DroppedFile = TargetFileName, DroppedSHA = TargetFileSHA256;
let _proxy_hits = ImWebSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where Url has_any (_cloud_share_hosts)
    | project DvcHostname, ClickTime = TimeGenerated, Url;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName has_any (_rmm_installers))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\msiexec.exe" and CommandLine has_any (_rmm_installers))
| extend Host = tolower(Computer)
| join kind=inner (_drops | extend Host = tolower(DvcHostname)) on Host
| where TimeGenerated between (DropTime .. DropTime + 2h)
| join kind=leftouter (_proxy_hits | extend Host = tolower(DvcHostname)) on Host
| where ClickTime between (DropTime - 30m .. DropTime + 5m) or isnull(ClickTime)
| project TimeGenerated, DropTime, ClickTime, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, DroppedFile, DroppedSHA, Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: MuddyWater pivoted in 2023-2024 to almost exclusively living-off-trusted-RMM tradecraft — TA450 / Mango Sandstorm operators send PDF lures whose URLs point at consumer cloud-file-share platforms (Egnyte, ShareFile, OneHub, TeraBox, Filebin) hosting ZIPs containing legitimately signed RMM installers (predominantly ScreenConnect/ConnectWise, Atera, RemoteUtilities, SimpleHelp, Syncro). No other trac

ucs.title: [LLM] MuddyWater POWERSTATS / PowGoop loader: side-loaded GoogleUpdate.exe spawning PowerShell from non-Google path
ucs.description: Detects the PowGoop loader signature called out in CISA AA22-055A and Mandiant's MuddyWater reporting: a renamed or relocated GoogleUpdate.exe / goopdate.exe runs from outside the legitimate Google install directories (Program Files\Google\) — DLL-side-loading goopdate.dll which decrypts an adjacent .txt config and stages POWERSTATS via a PowerShell/cmd/regsvr32 child. This sideload-and-launch pattern is essentially unique to MERCURY / Mango Sandstorm.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as first_seen values(Processes.process) as child_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as child_proc values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.parent_process_path) as parent_path values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("GoogleUpdate.exe","goopdate.exe") AND NOT (Processes.parent_process_path="*\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\*" OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\Program Files\\Google\\*")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","cmstp.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="* -enc *" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*IEX*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-Expression*") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM") by Processes.dest Processes.parent_process_name
| rename Processes.* AS *
| append [
    | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as first_seen from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name="goopdate.dll" AND NOT Filesystem.file_path="*\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\*" AND NOT Filesystem.file_path="*\\Program Files\\Google\\*" by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name
    | rename Filesystem.* AS *
]
| sort - first_seen
ucs.kql:
let _legit_google_paths = dynamic([@"c:\program files (x86)\google\",@"c:\program files\google\"]);
let _suspicious_children = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","cmstp.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let _ps_indicators = dynamic(["FromBase64String","DownloadString","-EncodedCommand"," -enc ","IEX","Invoke-Expression","::Decrypt"]);
let _proc_chain = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("googleupdate.exe","goopdate.exe")
    | extend ParentLow = tolower(InitiatingProcessFolderPath)
    | where not(ParentLow startswith @"c:\program files (x86)\google\")
        and not(ParentLow startswith @"c:\program files\google\")
    | where FileName in~ (_suspicious_children)
        or ProcessCommandLine has_any (_ps_indicators)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
              ParentSha = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ChildImage = FolderPath, ChildFile = FileName,
              ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine, ChildSha = SHA256;
let _dll_drops = DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where FileName =~ "goopdate.dll"
    | extend LoadDirLow = tolower(FolderPath)
    | where not(LoadDirLow startswith @"c:\program files (x86)\google\")
        and not(LoadDirLow startswith @"c:\program files\google\")
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, GoopdateDllPath = FolderPath, GoopdateDllSha = SHA256, LoaderImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath, LoaderName = InitiatingProcessFileName;
union withsource=Source _proc_chain, _dll_drops
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _suspicious_children = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","cmstp.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"]);
let _ps_indicators = dynamic(["FromBase64String","DownloadString","-EncodedCommand"," -enc ","IEX","Invoke-Expression"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\GoogleUpdate.exe" or ParentProcessName endswith "\\goopdate.exe"
| extend ParentLow = tolower(ParentProcessName)
| where not(ParentLow startswith @"c:\program files (x86)\google\")
    and not(ParentLow startswith @"c:\program files\google\")
| extend ChildLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where ChildLeaf in (_suspicious_children) or CommandLine has_any (_ps_indicators)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: MuddyWater PowGoop Loader - GoogleUpdate.exe Side-Loaded From Non-Google Path
id: 6f1e3a82-9b5d-4c4f-8f2a-7d3a9b1c5e44
status: experimental
description: Detects MuddyWater (Mango Sandstorm / MERCURY / TEMP.Zagros) PowGoop loader behavior. A renamed or relocated GoogleUpdate.exe (used to side-load goopdate.dll) is executed from outside the legitimate Google install directories and spawns a script-host or LOLBin child process used to stage POWERSTATS.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa22-055a
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0069/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1574.001
  - attack.t1036.005
  - attack.g0069
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\GoogleUpdate.exe'
      - '\goopdate.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\cmstp.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  selection_cmdline:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - ' -enc '
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'IEX'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
  filter_legit_google:
    ParentImage|startswith:
      - 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\'
      - 'C:\Program Files\Google\'
  condition: selection_parent and (selection_child or selection_cmdline) and not filter_legit_google
falsepositives:
  - Manually relocated Google Update binaries (extremely rare in production environments)
level: high
ucs.rationale: PowGoop is publicly attributed only to MuddyWater (CISA/CNMF AA22-055A; Mandiant; Cisco Talos). Its operating premise is masquerading as Google Update — a renamed GoogleUpdate.exe in a user-writable directory side-loads a malicious goopdate.dll, decrypts a same-folder .txt and stages POWERSTATS via PowerShell. Legitimate GoogleUpdate.exe always lives under Program Files\Google\ on x86 and x64; an

_field_issues.message: `Source` is not a column of DeviceImageLoadEvents, DeviceProcessEvents; it does exist on SecurityEvent, Event.
